decisions.rationale: Single-app SACCO; external IdP is overkill. Self-contained JWT issuance.
SACCO members are known entities. Admin creates accounts and sends password-reset email.
Industry standard. Short access token limits blast radius; refresh enables seamless UX.
Frontend needs user profile + roles + member data after login to hydrate UI.

decisions.decision: Liquibase migration with BCrypt-hashed default password
decisions.rationale: System must be usable on first startup.
More secure than sending temp passwords in transit.
Enables /api/v1/me to return linked member data for self-service.
Replace with direct JWT issuance. Eliminates form login dependency.

constraints: RSA key config must continue to work for JWT signing
BCrypt password encoding must remain consistent
Default admin password must meet complexity rules
Batch client auth replacement deferred to separate task
openQuestions: Default admin password: hardcoded vs env var with fallback
Refresh token rotation: single-use vs reusable
Batch client auth mechanism after OAuth2 removal
